title: Good: Callback+user_data atomicity via mutex
description:
In lichen_lora_l2_set_rx_callback() (lora_l2.c:279-290), the callback and user_data are updated under mutex with explicit comment explaining why: the RX thread reads both fields, so they must be updated together to avoid invoking a callback with mismatched user_data.

This catches a subtle race that atomics alone couldn't fix (two separate atomic writes are not atomic as a pair).

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:279-290
